title: Color-coded cable identification assembly and cable
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a color-coded cable identification assembly and a cable. The cable identification assembly comprises: a support element including a fixing element adapted to fix the support element to a cable; and a plurality of identification elements, which are detachably mounted on the support element with the cable being located between the support element and the plurality of identification elements. Each identification element has a predetermined color so that the plurality of identification elements are capable of forming a predetermined color code to identify the cable. The cable identification assembly according to the present disclosure can be very easily and rapidly mounted to the cable, thereby greatly saving the installation time of workers and thus reducing the labor cost and the chance of making a mistake. Compared with a conventional adhesive tape, the cable identification assembly according to the present disclosure can meet the requirements such as anti-ultraviolet, anti-aging and reuse, thereby further reducing the cost of the cable identification assembly.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A color-coded cable identification assembly, characterized in that the cable identification assembly comprises: a support element including a fixing element adapted to fix the support element to a cable; and a plurality of identification elements, which are detachably mounted on the support element with cable being located between the support element and the plurality of identification elements; wherein each identification element has a predetermined color, so that the plurality of identification elements are capable of forming a predetermined color code to identify the cable. 2. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 1, characterized in that the support element has a plate shape. 3. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 1, characterized in that each identification element is constructed as a substantially C-shaped flexible strip. 4. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to any one of claims 1 to 3, characterized in that the support element includes a plurality of pairs of mounting portions for mounting the plurality of identification elements, wherein each pair of mounting portions are adapted to mount one identification element. 5. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 4, characterized in that two mounting portions in each pair of mounting portions are located on two sides of the support element in a symmetrical manner relative to a center line of the support element. 6. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 4, characterized in that the mounting portion includes a guide groove having a curved path, so that an end of the identification element is slidable into the 

mounting portion along the curved path of the guide groove and holdable in the mounting portion. 7. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 6, characterized in that the curved path is substantially helical. 8. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 6, characterized in that the guide groove penetrates through an entire thickness of the support element. 9. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 6, characterized in that the guide groove extends through only a part of a thickness of the support element, thereby forming a guide recess having a curved path. 10. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 6, characterized in that each end of the identification element includes a cylindrical portion, the cylindrical portion includes a first step and a second step spaced apart as well as a recess formed between the first step and the second step, when the identification element is mounted to the support element, the recess is located in the guide groove, and the first step and the second step are located on an upper side and a lower side of the guide groove respectively. 11. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to any one of claims 1 to 3, characterized in that the fixing element is constructed as a C-shaped claw, and the cable is pressable into and holdable in the C-shaped claw. 12. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to any one of claims 1 to 3, characterized in that the support element includes a pair of fixing elements, which are located at two opposite ends on a same surface of the support element. 13. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to any one of claims 1 to 3, characterized in that a front side and a back side of the support element are both provided with the fixing elements, and the fixing elements 

disposed on the front side of the support element and the fixing elements disposed on the back side of the support element have different sizes to accommodate cables in different sizes. 14. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to any one of claims 1 to 3, characterized in that the support element is a support element made from plastic. 15. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to any one of claims 1 to 3, characterized in that each identification element is an identification element made from a material having a predetermined color. 16. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 15, characterized in that each identification element is an identification element made from PC material, POM material, or PA material having a predetermined color. 17. A color-coded cable identification assembly, characterized in that the cable identification assembly comprises a plurality of identification elements that are connectable to each other; wherein each identification element has a predetermined color so that the plurality of identification elements are capable of forming a predetermined color code to identify a cable; and wherein each identification element includes two half bodies having a same structure and connectable to each other, such that the two half bodies fix each identification element to the cable by surrounding the cable therebetween. 18. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 17, characterized in that each half body is semi-circular; wherein a first end of each half body has a first groove opened outward and a first snap-fit element protruding outward, and a second end of each half body has a second groove opened inward and a second snap-fit element protruding inward, the first groove and the first snap- fit element as well as the second groove and the second snap-fit element extend along an axial direction 

of the half body; and wherein the first groove of the first end of one half body is receivable the second snap-fit element of the second end of another half body, and the second groove of the second end of the one half body is receivable the first snap-fit element of the first end of said another half body , so that the one half body and said another half body are snap-fitly connectable to each other to form one identification element. 19. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 18, characterized in that an inner surface of each half body has a third groove opened inward and a third snap-fit element protruding inward, and an outer surface of each half body has a fourth groove opened outward and a fourth snap-fit element protruding outward, the third groove and the third snap-fit element as well as the fourth groove and the fourth snap-fit element extend along a circumferential direction of the half body, and the third groove and the third snap-fit element are spaced apart from the fourth groove and the fourth snap-fit element in the axial direction of the half body , and wherein the third groove of the half body of one identification element is receivable the fourth snap-fit element of the half body of another identification element, and the fourth groove of the half body of the one identification element is receivable the third snap-fit element of the half body of said another identification element, so that a plurality of identification elements are snap-fittable with each other to form the cable identification assembly. 20. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to any one of claims 17 to 19, characterized in that an inner surface of each half body includes any one of serrated portions, dot-like protrusions, and crossed strip-like protrusions. 21. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to any one of claims 17 to 19, characterized in that an inner surface of each half body includes a plurality of ribs distributed along a circumferential direction of the 

half body and extending along an axial direction of the half body. 22. A cable, characterized in that, the cable is mounted with a color-coded cable identification assembly according to any one of claims 1 to 16, or a color-coded cable identification assembly according to any one of claims 17 to 21. 23. A color-coded cable identification assembly, characterized in that the cable identification assembly comprises: a sleeve configured to be mounted over the cable with the cable extending through the sleeve; a plurality of identification rings, each of which includes at least one section provided with at least one predetermined color, so that the plurality of identification rings are capable of forming at least one color code; and a sheath configured to cooperate with the sleeve to retain the plurality of identification rings therebetween; wherein the sheath has a viewing window, and when the cable identification assembly has been assembled, the color code formed by the plurality of identification rings is exposed in the viewing window to identify the cable. 24. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 23, characterized in that each identification ring includes a plurality of sections distributed along a circumferential direction of the identification ring, and each section is provided with a predetermined color, so that different color codes are formable by selectively exposing one of the plurality of sections of each identification ring. 25. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 23 or 24, characterized in that the sleeve includes a body for mounting the plurality of identification rings, and the body is cylindrical. 26. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 25, characterized in that the sleeve further includes a first step portion located at a 

first end of the body and a second step portion adjacent to the first step portion, wherein the first step portion is configured to restrict movement of the plurality of identification rings toward the first end of the body along an axial direction of the body, and the second step portion is configured to restrict movement of the sheath toward the first end of the body along the axial direction of the body. 27. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 26, characterized in that the sleeve further includes a fastening portion at a second end of the body, wherein the fastening portion is configured to contract radially inwardly when the sheath is mounted on the sleeve, so as to fix the sleeve and the cable identification assembly over the cable. 28. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 27, characterized in that at least a portion of the fastening portion of the sleeve has a fmsto-conical shape and is composed of a plurality of elastic fingers. 29. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 27, characterized in that the sheath includes a tapered portion configured to contact the fastening portion of the sleeve radially inwardly when the sheath is mounted over the sleeve. 30. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 26, characterized in that the sleeve further includes a first positioning and indicating element configured to position the plurality of identification rings and indicate a position where the color code formed by the plurality of identification rings should be located. 31. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 30, characterized in that the sleeve further includes a second positioning and indicating element configured to position the sheath and indicate a position where the viewing window of the sheath should be located. 32. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 30, characterized in that the first positioning and indicating element is configured as a first key protruding from an outer surface of the body and extending along 

the axial direction of the body. 33. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 32, characterized in that each identification ring includes at least one groove adapted to cooperate with the first key, wherein the groove is provided in an inner surface of the identification ring. 34. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 30, characterized in that the first positioning and indicating element is configured as a hole provided in an end surface of the first step portion of the sleeve. 35. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 34, characterized in that each identification ring includes at least one post provided on a front end surface of the identification ring and at least one hole provided in a rear end surface of the identification ring, wherein the post of each identification ring is adapted to be received in a hole provided in an end surface of the first step portion of the sleeve or received in a hole provided in the rear end surface of another identification ring. 36. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 31, characterized in that the second positioning and indicating element is configured as a second key protruding from a circumferential surface of the first step portion of the sleeve and extending along an axial direction of the first step portion of the sleeve. 37. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 36, characterized in that the sheath includes a groove adapted to cooperate with the second key, wherein the groove is provided in an inner surface of the sheath. 38. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 31, characterized in that the second positioning and indicating element is configured as a bayonet arrangement provided on a circumferential surface of the first step portion of the sleeve, wherein the bayonet arrangement includes a cutout extending along an axial direction of the first step portion and a recessed portion extending along a circumferential direction of the first step portion. 39. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 38, characterized in that the sheath includes a protrusion adapted to cooperate with a recessed portion of the bayonet arrangement, wherein the protrusion is disposed on an inner surface of the sheath. 40. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 39, characterized in that the bayonet arrangement further includes a stopper configured to prevent the sheath from accidentally moving out of the recessed portion by an interference fit between the stopper and the protrusion of the sleeve. 41. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 24, characterized in that an outer surface of each identification ring includes slits for separating the plurality of sections. 42. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 23 or 24, characterized in that the viewing window includes a plurality of openings, each of which exposes at least a portion of one corresponding section of one identification ring. 43. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 23 or 24, characterized in that the identification ring is made of plastic or metal, and the section of the identification ring is made of plastic or silicone rubber. 44. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 43, characterized in that the section of the identification ring is fixed to the identification ring by any one of secondary molding, overmolding, fusion, welding, friction fit, interference fit, and mechanical connection. 45. A cable , characterized in that, the cable is mounted with a color-coded cable identification assembly according to any one of claims 23 to 44. 46. A method of identifying a cable using a color-coded cable identification assembly, characterized in that the cable identification assembly comprises: a sleeve configured to be mounted over the cable with the cable extending through the sleeve; a plurality of identification rings, each of which 

includes at least one section provided with at least one predetermined color, so that the plurality of identification rings are capable of forming at least one color code; and a sheath configured to cooperate with the sleeve to retain the plurality of identification rings therebetween, wherein the sheath has a viewing window; the method comprises: step i: sequentially mounting the sleeve, the plurality of identification rings, and the sheath over the cable with cable extending therethrough; step ii: selecting a color of each of the plurality of identification rings that will be used to form a predetermined color code, and positioning each identification ring over the sleeve; and step iii: positioning the sheath over the sleeve with the plurality of identification rings being retained between the sleeve and the sheath and the predetermined color code being exposed in the viewing window of the sheath. 47. The method according to claim 46, characterized in that each identification ring includes a plurality of sections distributed along a circumferential direction of the identification ring, each of which is provided with a predetermined color, and the step ii includes: rotating each identification ring to select a section having a color that will be used to form the predetermined color code, and positioning the selected section of each identification ring at a position where the selected section is exposable in the viewing window of the sheath. 48. The method according to claim 47, characterized in that the method further comprises an adjustment step for adjusting the plurality of identification rings to form a new color code, the adjustment step includes: removing the sheath from the sleeve; moving each of the plurality of identification rings to a position where adjustment is possible; rotating each identification ring to select a section having a color that will 

be used to form the new color code, and positioning the selected section of each identification ring at a position where the selected section is exposable in the viewing window of the sheath. 49. A color-coded cable identification assembly, characterized in that the cable identification assembly comprises: a support element; and a plurality of identification elements, wherein each of the plurality of identification elements is lockable with the support element to form the cable identification assembly, and the plurality of identification elements fixedly mount the cable identification assembly to a cable by locking the cable between the support element and the plurality of identification elements; wherein each identification element has a predetermined color so that the plurality of identification elements are capable of forming a predetermined color code to identify the cable. 50. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 49, characterized in that the support element includes a plurality of pairs of first locking members, and each identification element includes a pair of second locking members, wherein the pair of second locking members of each identification element are adapted to be locked with one pair of the plurality of pairs of first locking members of the support element. 51. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 50, characterized in that each pair of first locking members of the support element are constructed as a pair of protrusions provided on two opposite sides of the support element, and the pair of second locking members of the identification element are configured to a pair of holes adapted to receive the pair of protrusions of the support element. 52. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 51, characterized in that each protrusion is a wedge-shaped protrusion, and each hole is a quadrilateral hole. 53. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 51, characterized in that each protrusion is a quarter-spherical protrusion, and each hole is a semi-circular hole. 54. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 49, characterized in that an inner surface of each identification element is provided with an elastic structure which abut against the cable with an elastic force when the identification element is locked with the support element. 55. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 49, characterized in that an inner surface of each identification element is provided with a friction portion for increasing a friction force between the identification element and the cable. 56. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 55, characterized in that the friction portion includes at least one of serrations, ribs, protrusions and scores. 57. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 50, characterized in that each identification element has a U shape, and the pair of second locking members are respectively disposed on two legs of the U-shaped identification element. 58. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 57, characterized in that each leg of the U-shaped identification element includes an inclined portion located on an inner surface of a free end of the leg, wherein the inclined portion helps to mount the identification element to the support element. 59. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 49, characterized in that each identification element further includes a first portion that cooperates with the support element and a second portion that cooperates with the cable, wherein the first portion and the second portion have different sizes. 60. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to any one of 

claims 49 to 59, characterized in that each identification element is configured to be locked on the support element with a single action. 61. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to any one of claims 49 to 59, characterized in that the support element has a plate shape. 62. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 50, characterized in that the support element has plate shape, the plate shaped support element includes a front face, a back face, two opposite end faces and two opposite side surfaces, and each pair of first locking members of the support element are respectively disposed on two opposite side surfaces of the support element. 63. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 62, characterized in that the support element further includes a plurality of pairs of flanges provided on the two opposite side surfaces of the support element, and the plurality of pairs of flanges are alternately arranged with the plurality of first locking members in a length direction of the support element to allow that each pair of first locking members are located between two adjacent pairs of flanges, wherein each flange extends outward from the side surface in a width direction of the support element, and extends beyond the back surface of the support element in a thickness direction thereof. 64. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to any one of claims 49 to 59, characterized in that the cable identification assembly further includes an anti-unlocking element for preventing the identification element from being unlocked from the support element. 65. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 64, characterized in that the anti-unlocking element is constructed as a cover which includes a bottom and side walls projecting upward from both sides of the bottom, wherein the side walls are configured to prevent a second locking member of the identification element from moving towards a direction that will unlock the second locking member from a first locking member of the support 

element. 66. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 65, characterized in that a fixing element for fixing the cover to the support element is provided at the bottom of the cover. 67. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 66, characterized in that the fixing element is constructed as a snap-fit element which includes an upper inclined portion that facilitates the inserting of the snap-fit element into an aperture of the support element and a lower inclined portion that facilitates the extracting of the snap-fit element from the aperture of the support element. 68. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 66, characterized in that a positioning element for positioning the cover relative to the support element is further provided at the bottom of the cover. 69. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 68, characterized in that the positioning element is a positioning pin. 70. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to any one of claims 49 to 59, characterized in that the support element is a support element made from plastic. 71. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to any one of claims 49 to 59, characterized in that each identification element is an identification element made from a material having a predetermined color. 72. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 71, characterized in that each identification element is an identification element made from PC material, POM material, or PA material having a predetermined color. 73. The color-coded cable identification assembly according to claim 50, characterized in that each pair of first locking members of the support element are configured to be a pair of openings disposed at a front surface of the support element and penetrate through the support element, and the pair of second locking members of the identification element are constructed as a pair 

of barbs. 74. A cable, characterized in that the cable is mounted with the color-coded cable identification assembly according to any one of claims 49 to 73.
